title: claytonia multiscapa subsp. pacifica
intro: Claytonia multiscapa subsp. pacifica, also known as the Pacific spring beauty or coastal spring beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the purslane family (Portulacaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia multiscapa subsp. pacifica include potential treatment of conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
